critical_issues: FALSE COMPLETION CLAIMS: Both worker and coordinator claimed tests pass but they fail
SPECIFICATION MISMATCH: Test expects '/auth/signin?logout=true', implementation uses '/' or '/bdv2/'

test_evidence.result: Test Suites: 1 failed, 1 skipped, 24 passed, 25 of 26 total

findings.notes: CRITICAL: Both Layer 1 (worker) and Layer 2 (coordinator) validation claimed unit tests pass, but independent verification shows logout-button.test.tsx is clearly failing. This represents a systemic failure in validation process.

systemic_concerns: Multiple validation layers making false success claims
Tests not actually being run before claiming completion
Lack of independent verification at lower levels
recommendations: Require actual test execution evidence (not just claims)
Implement automated test gating before validation requests
Review validation practices across all levels
content.summary: HARD REJECTION - Unit tests failing despite claims at all levels. Cannot pass Layer 3 validation until tests actually pass.
